title: Chart Label Resizing
excerpt: Please add the ability to make better use of the space in chart widgets. There is too much white space and the label for the selected data gets truncated.

posts.author: bbrunelle (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the ability to make better use of the space in chart widgets. There is too much white space and the label for the selected data gets truncated.

posts.author: jeffrey597doss (Jeffrey Doss)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
To improve chart widgets, reduce white space by adjusting margins and padding, and implement dynamic label sizing or wrapping to prevent truncation. Add tooltips for full label visibility, ensure responsive design for better space utilization, and optimize label placement, such as rotating labels or placing them inside chart areas. These changes will enhance readability and usability.

Regards,
Mary Kay Inc
